prompt: Photorealistic dusk scene in a large open courtyard, filled with a dense crowd of people softly interacting. Every individual stands slightly apart at the edge of a group, looking inward toward others who seem more connected. However, every group reveals the same pattern — each person is also positioned at a periphery relative to someone else. There is no true center, only layers of perceived connection. Composition: wide-angle, deep perspective, layered crowd depth. Mood: quiet unease, subtle contradiction, social isolation within connection. Color palette: warm golden light inside the crowd fading into cool blue shadows. No text, no numbers, no symbols, no diagrams.
visual_logic: A layered crowd where each person stands at the edge of a group while others appear more connected, repeating across the scene so no individual is central, reflecting how others always seem more connected.
